statement: Does NOT claim from_node == deriveNodeId(from_locator): no content-address re-derivation (spine boundary forbids importing clotho/registry.mjs; reimplementing drifts). Establishes only intra-snapshot locator<->id bijective consistency (GPT-seat Ruling A, adopted by The Eye).
The digest check is integrity relative to the supplied manifest only — NOT a durable trust root. No CURRENT-AUTHORITY anchoring, authority continuity, or publisher identity is claimed.
Does NOT verify the Clotho record-hash chain, Ed25519 signatures, header pub_key, or trailer cryptography — those fields are checked for presence only.
Does NOT enforce a full per-kind locator field schema (only: payload present + non-empty object); the bijection is over structural locator values, not validated Clotho identities.

measure operates on the frozen, digest-stamped structure loadWeave returns; it does not cryptographically prove provenance of a weave-shaped object. The realpath->open TOCTOU window is narrowed (fd read), not eliminated.

Measures over the edges PRESENT: supersedes/discharges are accepted (complete-set discipline) but NOT interpreted as retiring other edges; retirement-aware measurement is future work (the pinned snapshot has 0 such records).
The risk class is ADVISORY input to TELOS/The Eye — never an enforced gate; relevance is a reported salience proxy, not ground truth and not risk-feeding.
